title: CommitteeMember Canonical Schema
$comment: Last modified on 2026-03-10 by Hans Bot - NEN, Please note V1.1.0 has been aligned with the attributes as currently avaiable in SAP. Additionally, personDetails are split off into the generic nenDefinitions file for reuse.

memberId.$comment: in SAP: either 'contactpersoonID', or 'Werknemers-ID' (not necessarily unique)

memberRole.description: The role of the committee member within the NEN committee, such as 'Chair', 'Secretary', 'Member', etc.

nenMember.description: Indicates whether the member is a NEN employee (and consequently, that memberId equals the 'Werknemers-ID'

updatedAt.description: The date and time when the member was last updated.
